pages.text: $(o)"They cast no spells, build no circles, study no elements. They do one thing — they record."$()$(br2)$(l)Inscribers$() are the least-respected and most-enduring group of the lost circle civilization. From the original $(o)Eighteenfold Treatise of Elements$() to every mage's casting journal to the epic written after the circles fell — all come from their hand.

pages.title: The Three Pieces
pages.text: The Inscriber's Regalia consists of three items:$(br2)$(l)$(#FFAA00)Inscriber's Hood$()$() — a soft hood never bloodied$(br)$(l)$(#FFAA00)Inscriber's Robe$()$() — a robe with ink-stained cuffs$(br)$(l)$(#FFAA00)Inscriber's Stylus$()$() — an unassuming quill$(br2)None carries combat stats — by design.
$(l)Inscriber's Hood$()$(br2)Inscribers never wear war-helms.$(br2)Their saying: $(o)"Eyes hidden under iron lose the texture of the page."$()
$(l)Inscriber's Robe$()$(br2)Every senior inscriber's cuffs are saturated with ink — accumulated "heraldry" of decades of transcription.$(br2)$(o)"We bleed in ink."$() — Inscriber's initiation oath

$(l)Inscriber's Stylus$()$(br2)An ordinary-looking quill, yet truly the "scepter" with which others' spells are reviewed.$(br2)$(o)"A pen that cannot wound — that line itself is its power."$()$(br2)Shares lineage with the Inscription Quill — but its purpose is not imprinting, only examining.

pages.title: Why They Exist
pages.text: At the civilization's peak, the seven schools warred over elemental orthodoxy. Pyromancers burned the Cryomancer library; Abysswalkers "erased" three Stormcaller elders.$(br2)Only the Inscribers did not participate. From the corners, they quietly transcribed every school's work — including the "victors" who erased their rivals' records.$(br2)$(o)"Circles fall. Elements run dry. But while one quill remains, civilization is not yet dead."$()

pages.title: Inscribers Today
pages.text: Over a thousand years since the civilization's fall.$(br2)Yet if you've ever seen, in some ruin's corner, ink still wet on a page, a bookshelf still standing, or a roll of unmarked parchment —$(br2)it is no coincidence.$(br2)Inscribers remain.
